summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 candidate PRs. No shared canonical was invented. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; already-closed PRs are kept closed; remaining open non-security PRs are kept for normal maintainer/contributor workflow because this job disables merge, fix PRs, instant close, and low-signal closeout.
